# GitHub Discussions

Forge Agent uses GitHub Discussions for community interaction, questions, and sharing.

## Categories

### 💡 Ideas
Share ideas for new features, tools, templates, or general improvements.
Not ready to open a formal issue? Start a discussion here first to gather feedback.

### 🙋 Q&A
Ask questions about using Forge Agent.
How do I...? Why does...? What is the best way to...? The community and maintainers are here to help.

### 🔌 Show and Tell — Plugins
Share custom plugins you have built!
Include the code and a brief example of what it can do. Good plugins may be featured in the documentation.

### 📋 Show and Tell — Templates
Share custom task templates that work well for your specific tech stack or workflow.

### 🚀 Show and Tell — Projects
Showcase the projects you have built using Forge Agent. We'd love to see what you're creating!

### 📣 Announcements
Official release announcements, project news, and community updates (maintainers only).
